'''âth-v-f''' ('''kathavaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whore|whore]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whore|whore]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-v-f
|-
! Lemma
| kathavaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithavaf|thithavaf]] || [[word:jithavaf|jithavaf]] || [[word:shithavaf|shithavaf]] || [[word:kithavaf|kithavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthavaf|thuthuthavaf]] || [[word:jujuthavaf|jujuthavaf]] || [[word:shushuthavaf|shushuthavaf]] || [[word:kukuthavaf|kukuthavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthavaf|thuthavaf]] || [[word:juthavaf|juthavaf]] || [[word:shuthavaf|shuthavaf]] || [[word:kuthavaf|kuthavaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthavaf|thuthavaf]] || [[word:juthavaf|juthavaf]] || [[word:shuthavaf|shuthavaf]] || [[word:kuthavaf|kuthavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethavaf|thethavaf]] || [[word:jethavaf|jethavaf]] || [[word:shethavaf|shethavaf]] || [[word:kethavaf|kethavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothavaf|thothothavaf]] || [[word:jojothavaf|jojothavaf]] || [[word:shoshothavaf|shoshothavaf]] || [[word:kokothavaf|kokothavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothavaf|thothavaf]] || [[word:jothavaf|jothavaf]] || [[word:shothavaf|shothavaf]] || [[word:kothavaf|kothavaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothavaf|thothavaf]] || [[word:jothavaf|jothavaf]] || [[word:shothavaf|shothavaf]] || [[word:kothavaf|kothavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthavaf|thĂŠthavaf]] || [[word:jĂŠthavaf|jĂŠthavaf]] || [[word:shĂŠthavaf|shĂŠthavaf]] || [[word:kĂŠthavaf|kĂŠthavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathavaf|thathathavaf]] || [[word:jajathavaf|jajathavaf]] || [[word:shashathavaf|shashathavaf]] || [[word:kakathavaf|kakathavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathavaf|thathavaf]] || [[word:jathavaf|jathavaf]] || [[word:shathavaf|shathavaf]] || [[word:kathavaf|kathavaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathavaf|thathavaf]] || [[word:jathavaf|jathavaf]] || [[word:shathavaf|shathavaf]] || [[word:kathavaf|kathavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathavaf|shathavaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathavaf|goshathavaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathavaf|gokishathavaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathavafnĂŒ|shathavafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathavafnknĂŒ|goshathavafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavafnĂŒ|gokishathavafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathavafshĂ«|shathavafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathavafnkshĂ«|goshathavafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathavafshĂ«|gokishathavafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavafro|shathavafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavafnkro|goshathavafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavafro|gokishathavafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavafmu|shathavafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavafnkmu|goshathavafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavafmu|gokishathavafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathavafsher|shathavafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathavafnksher|goshathavafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathavafsher|gokishathavafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathavafng|shathavafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathavafnkng|goshathavafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathavafng|gokishathavafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathavafya|shathavafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathavafnkya|goshathavafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathavafya|gokishathavafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathavafyam|shathavafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathavafnkyam|goshathavafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathavafyam|gokishathavafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathavafnĂŒshĂ«|shathavafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathavafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathavafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathavafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathavafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavafnĂŒro|shathavafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavafnknĂŒro|goshathavafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavafnĂŒro|gokishathavafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavafnĂŒmu|shathavafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavafnknĂŒmu|goshathavafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavafnĂŒmu|gokishathavafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathavafshĂ«nĂŒ|shathavafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathavafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathavafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathavafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavafshĂ«ro|shathavafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavafnkshĂ«ro|goshathavafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavafshĂ«ro|gokishathavafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavafshĂ«mu|shathavafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavafnkshĂ«mu|goshathavafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavafshĂ«mu|gokishathavafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathavafronĂŒ|shathavafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathavafnkronĂŒ|goshathavafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavafronĂŒ|gokishathavafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathavafroshĂ«|shathavafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathavafnkroshĂ«|goshathavafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathavafroshĂ«|gokishathavafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavafromu|shathavafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavafnkromu|goshathavafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavafromu|gokishathavafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathavafmunĂŒ|shathavafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathavafnkmunĂŒ|goshathavafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavafmunĂŒ|gokishathavafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathavafmushĂ«|shathavafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathavafnkmushĂ«|goshathavafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathavafmushĂ«|gokishathavafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavafmuro|shathavafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavafnkmuro|goshathavafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavafmuro|gokishathavafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
